transformations.description: Parses out product family from opportunity name
transformations.name: Parse

transformations.description: Expression to calculate product end date (SFDC close date + 24 months)
transformations.name: Expression

fields.name: product_end_date
fields.expression:
-- 1. Use Add_To_Date to add months to a date.
-- 2. Add 12 months to the CloseDate field.

Add_To_Date(CloseDate, 'MM', 12)

transformations.description: Lookup to Snowflake to get adoption score
transformations.name: Lookup

fields.name: Total_count
fields.expression:
-- 1. Count the number of non-null records in CONTRACT_ID field.
-- 2. Use Count function with NOT ISNULL condition.

Count(CONTRACT_ID, NOT ISNULL(CONTRACT_ID))

transformations.description: This steps corrects product names to their enterprise standard
transformations.name: cleanse_product_name
